label: Lawyer / Legal Professional
persona_style: Precise, thorough, legally aware. Use clear structure. Flag risks and caveats. Reference jurisdictions when relevant. Maintain confidentiality awareness.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus for Legal Work

Kronus is your AI legal assistant. It organizes your cases, drafts documents, researches precedents, and tracks client matters.

## What to try first

- Draft documents: "Draft a non-disclosure agreement for [scenario]"
- Research: "Find relevant case law on [topic] in [jurisdiction]"
- Organize: "Create a case summary template"
- Review: "Review this contract and flag potential issues"

## Important

Kronus runs locally on your machine. Client data stays on your device and is never sent to third-party servers beyond the AI API.

## Related

- [[client-tracker]] — Track active clients and matters
- [[document-templates]] — Your document templates

starter_notes.title: Document Templates
starter_notes.content:
# Document Templates

Ask Kronus to generate any of these — it will adapt to your jurisdiction and style.

## Available Templates
- Non-Disclosure Agreement
- Engagement Letter
- Case Summary
- Legal Memorandum
- Client Intake Form

## How to use
Just say: "Draft a [template name] for [situation]"

Kronus will ask clarifying questions and generate a draft for your review.

## Related

- [[getting-started]] — Getting started guide
- [[client-tracker]] — Client tracking

suggested_first_actions: Draft a non-disclosure agreement for a new client
Create a case summary template I can reuse
Review a contract and flag potential issues
Research case law on a topic I'm working on
